rows.label: qev050105_MSG0001
rows.name:
How are you... able to remain so
calm, yet occasionally strike with
moves that border on the reckless?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0002
rows.name:
Fire and water, it was as if two opposing
forces resided within a single body... I
couldn't read your attacks at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0003
rows.name:
...No, rather, were my attacks too
easy to read? I see... This is what
our master wanted to convey...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0004
rows.name:
It was precisely because Gi Ziordo
caught our opponents off guard that I
was able to strike at their openings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0005
rows.name:
Yes... Perhaps what I truly needed was
exactly his kind of brutishness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_JNK0010
rows.name: Advise

rows.label: qev050105_SEL0011
rows.name:
Recommend that he resume his
training alongside Gi Ziordo.

rows.label: qev050105_JNK0020
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: qev050105_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell him off, demanding he grasp what
he lacks with his own two hands.

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0006
rows.name:
True... Without him by my
side, I suppose it is something
I could never obtain...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0007
rows.name:
I thought I could do everything
on my own... But my battle
with you proved otherwise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0008
rows.name:
I need that brutish man. We
must grow stronger together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0009
rows.name:
I said some truly awful things to
him, so I'm not sure how to even
start the conversation, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0010
rows.name:
First, I will return to our
master, Go Belg, and express my
gratitude for sending you to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0011
rows.name:
You must go and fight my
greatest rival and sworn
ally... Go and fight Gi Ziordo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0012
rows.name:
Heh... He is a truly wild horse. He
won't be dealt with as easily as I was.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0013
rows.name:
How are you... able to remain so
calm, yet occasionally strike with
moves that border on the reckless?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0014
rows.name:
Fire and water, it was as if two opposing
forces resided within a single body... I
couldn't read your attacks at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0015

...No, rather, were my attacks too

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0016

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0017

exactly his kind of brutishness...[ST:wait ]

rows.name:
Recommend that he resume his
training alongside Gi Ziordo.

rows.label: qev050105_JNK0040

rows.label: qev050105_SEL0041
rows.name:

he lacks with his own two hands.

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0019

I thought I could do everything
on my own... But my battle

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0020

must grow stronger together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0021
rows.name:
I said some truly awful things to
him, so I'm not sure how to even
start the conversation, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0022
rows.name:
First, I will return to our
master, Go Belg, and express my
gratitude for sending you to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Heh, my greatest rival and sworn
ally... I wonder if Gi Ziordo gained
something similar from his battle with you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0024
rows.name:
What did he say, you ask...? No,
I should simply ask him myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050105_MSG0025
rows.name: ...Thank you. I will take my leave now.[ST:wait ]
